claimRotation().details: Claim rotation payout on your turn Advances rotation index

contribute().details: Make a contribution for the current round

dissolve().details: Dissolve circle early if it fails (only agent) Returns contributions to members proportionally

harvestYield().details: Harvest yield from Moola Market and compound (only agent)

initialize(address,uint256).details: Initialize circle with contribution amount and token address Only agent can call, only in FORMING state

join(uint256).details: Join a circle (trust-gated) User must meet minimum trust score from CircleTrust contract

penalize(address).details: Penalize a member for missed contribution (only agent) Deducts from member's escrowed contributions (NOT their wallet) After 3 penalties, member is evicted

startCircle().details: Start the circle (only agent, transitions from FORMING to ACTIVE)

sweepToYield(uint256).details: Move idle capital to yield vault (only agent) Transfers tokens to Moola Market for yield
